name: virizion
flavor_texts: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.
Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents.
Legends say this Pokémon confounded opponents with its swift movements.
A legend tells of this Pokémon working together with Cobalion and Terrakion to protect the Pokémon of the Unova region.
It darts around opponents with a flurry of quick movements, slicing them up with its horns.
text: Virizion is the Grassland Pokémon. It is a grass and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: justified. Base stats — HP: 91, Attack: 90, Defense: 72, Sp. Atk: 90, Sp. Def: 129, Speed: 108. Evolution line: virizion. Lore: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down. Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents. Legends say this Pokémon confounded opponents with its swift movements. A legend tells of this Pokémon working together with Cobalion and Terrakion to protect the Pokémon of the Unova region. It darts around opponents with a flurry of quick movements, slicing them up with its horns.
